case_title: ZEGARRA, LINDA VS BRAMBILA, MARIA(MGR)DBA"GREAT MISSION HAIR DESIGN" et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAILING TO MARIA BRAILA, GREAT MISSION HAIR DESIGN, RETURNED SIGNED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY ZEGARRA, LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT BRAMBILA, MARIA(MGR)DBA"GREAT MISSION HAIR DESIGN" JANE DOE CASTANEDA, RAMIRO DBA GREAT MISSION HAIR SALON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2001 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZEGARRA, LINDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRAMBILA, MARIA(MGR)DBA"GREAT MISSION HAIR DESIGN" JANE DOE CASTANEDA, RAMIRO DBA GREAT MISSION HAIR SALON MARIA BRAMBILA IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AND IS REPLACED BY RAMIRO CASTANEDA DBA GREAT MISSION HAIR SALON AS DEFENDANT. JANE DOE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
